qas.q: Which Employee is Not a Hazmat Employee?
qas.a:
A. Hazardous waste shipping manager
B. Empolyee clsoing drums of hazardous waste
C. Person placing a flammable liquids hazmat label on a d....waste
D. Person who signs the Hazardous Waste Manifest
E. Janitorial helper in the flammable storage area

Answer» E

qas.q: Which products are probably Hazardous Waste?
qas.a:
A. Hair Dryer
B. Spray pesticides
C. W-D 40 aerosol
D. Wine
E. AA alkaline batteries
F. Toilet cleaner with acid
G. Hand sanitizer
H. Charcoal lighter fluid
I. Toy fireworks
J. Nail polish
K. Perfume/aftershave
L. Chlorine pool tabs

Answer » B, C, F, G, H, I, J, K, L

qas.q:
Match the hazardous waste code with its description

1. F-List
2. P-List
3. U-List


Description:
a. Unused acutely hazardous waste
b. Spent process waste from non-specific sources
c. Unused toxic and other hazardous waste
qas.a:
F-List » b

P-List » a

U-List » c

qas.q: Which are Federal Characteristics? (check 4 answers)
qas.a:
a. Ignitability
b. Explodebility
c. Corrosivity
d. Toxicity
e. Reactivity
f. Poisonous

Answer » a, c, d, & e

qas.q: Generator status must be determined every:
qas.a:
a. day
b. month
c. year
d. 5 years

Answer » b

qas.q: What is missing from this picture? (Shows a black container)
qas.a:
a. hazardous waste markings
b. closed lid
c. date 55 gallons is reached
d. all of the above

Answer » d

qas.q: How much non-acute hazardous waste may be accumulated in the satellite area?
qas.a:
a. 5 gallons
b. 10 gallons
c. 55 gallons
d. 100 gallons

Answer » c

qas.q: Which statement is true for universal waste:
qas.a:
a. Handlers may store universal waste up to 1 year
b. Universal waste must be shipped using a hazardous waste manifest
c. Universal waste must be marked as hazardous waste
d. Universal waste can be thrown in the trash

Answer » a

qas.q: Used oil includes:
qas.a:
a. Vegetable oil
b. Mineral oil
c. Crude oil and synthetic oil
d. All of the above

Answer » c

qas.q: Preparedness and Prevention planning includes:
qas.a:
a. Emergency response and decontamination equipment
b. Periodic testing and maintaining of emergency equipment
c. Agreements with external emergency response agencies
d. All of the above

Answer » d

qas.q: Which container rules apply to containers holding hazardous waste in accumulation areas? (Select all that apply)
qas.a:
a. Closed
b. Compatible with its content
c. Good condition
d. Secured/Chained to a wall
e. Stored in a locker room

Answer » a, b, & c

qas.q: Which generator status based on?
qas.a:
a. Monthly average over the course of a year
b. Hazardous waste generated during the month
c. Amount shipped off site on a manifest
d. The total amount stored on site at any one time

Answer » b

qas.q: Hazardous waste accumulated at a satellite accumulation point must be:
qas.a:
a. At or near the point if generation
b. In compatible containers that are kept closed
c. Marked with the required hazardous waste markings
d. All of the above

Answer » d

qas.q: A waste containing 40% alcohol and 60% water with a flashpoint of 79^F would be classified as a D001 hazardous waste.
qas.a:
True or False

Answer » True

qas.q: At a minimum, what must be marked on central accumulation containers?
qas.a:
a. "Hazardous waste"
b. Amount of waste on the container
c. Accumulation start date
d. TSDF/Receiving facility name
e. Hazards associated with the waste

Answer » a, c, & e

qas.q: A material is hazardous if:
qas.a:
a. It is described on the F, K, P or U-list
b. It exhibits a characteristic of ignitability, corrosivity, reactivity, or toxicity
c. The State designates the material as hazardous
d. All of the above

Answer » d

qas.q: How often must hazardous waste personnel be trained in the hazardous waste management and emergency procedures?
qas.a:
a. Every 6 months
b. Annually
c. No specific time period
d. Monthly

Answer » b

qas.q: How often is training required by the DOT for hazmat employees?
qas.a:
a. Every year
b. Every 2 years
c. Every 3 years
d. As an employee dictates

Answer » c

qas.q: What is Amazon responsible for with hazardous waste shipments?
qas.a:
a. Packaging
b. Marking, labeling, placarding
c. Hazardous Waste Manifest
d. All of the above

Answer » d

qas.q: When shipping flammable nail polish in retail sizes for disposal, it is a hazardous waste and is therefore a DOT hazardous material for transport.
qas.a:
True or False

Answer » True

qas.q: A UN-performance oriented package has gone through certain testing requirements, and manufacture closure instructions must be followed to close these containers for transportation.
qas.a:
True or False

Answer » True

qas.q: Select the correct DOT hazard class label for a drum of Class 3 flammable liquids waste.
qas.a:
a. (red&white stripe) flammable liquid 4
b. (half back&half white horizontal) corrosive 8
c. (solid red) flammable liquid 3
d. (Solid red) flammable gas 2

Answer » c

qas.q: Select the correct order of the basic description on a Hazardous Waste Manifest
qas.a:
a. Waste flammable liquids, n.o.s. (benzene, xylene), UN1993, 3, PG II, ERG 128
b. UN1993, Waste flammable liquids, n.o.s. (benzene, xylene), 3, PG II, ERG 128
c. 3, Waste flammable liquids, n.o.s. (benzene, xylene), UN1993, PG 11, ERG 128
d. PG 11, Waste flammable liquids, n.o.s. (benzene, xylene), UN1993, ERG 128

Answer » b

qas.q: Is a placard required for six drums of Class 3 flammable liquids, weighing 1,500 lb total?
qas.a:
Yes or No

Answer » yes

qas.q: Select the Emergency Response Guidebook guide number for an incident involving UN1266, perfumery products...
During the set up of the waste containers, do you assign the weight limit and unit of measure to the container - Yes or No? (Waste Tracker)
qas.a: Answer » Yes

qas.q: After setting up the waste container, do you need to print the container label and apply it to the container - Yes or No? (Waste Tracker)
qas.a: Answer » Yes
